claude-base.description: Shared Claude Code baseline structure and conventions for every repository.

release-notes.description: Helps standardize release-note authoring across repositories.
notes: This generates only a local override stub.
Keep repo-specific formatting here instead of changing managed templates.

security-audit.description: Guides a lightweight security audit and threat review for the current repo.
notes: This generates only a local override stub.
Keep findings and repo-specific security practices here.

path-safety.description: Checks common path traversal and filesystem write risks in repo tooling.
notes: This generates only a local override stub.
Use it when adding new file-writes or accepting user-controlled paths.

mcp-hardening.description: Reviews MCP configuration trust boundaries and safe defaults for shared repos.
notes: This generates only a local override stub.
Use it before enabling MCPs in CI or shared machines.

secrets-and-supply-chain.description: Documents how the repo handles secrets, registries, and third-party execution safely.
notes: This generates only a local override stub.
Capture agreed rules (token storage, pinning, review steps) here.

triage.description: Documents repo-specific issue triage rules and escalation paths.
notes: Use the override stub to describe ownership and local workflows.

context7.description: Up-to-date code and library documentation via Context7 MCP.
notes: This uses the official remote Context7 MCP endpoint.
Add a CONTEXT7_API_KEY header later if you want higher rate limits.

filesystem.description: Example MCP registration for local filesystem access.
notes: Review the generated MCP definition before enabling it in CI or on shared machines.
